examples.title: Numeric Only JTextField with DocumentFilter
examples.description: Implementation of a JTextField that accepts only numeric input using a custom DocumentFilter
examples.explanation: This custom PlainDocument implementation acts as a DocumentFilter. The insertString() method intercepts all text insertions before they reach the document. It validates each character and only allows digits. This approach is superior to KeyListener because it also handles paste operations correctly.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is the length of inserted string

examples.title: JTextField with Real-time Validation using DocumentListener
examples.description: Complete example showing form validation with multiple listeners
examples.explanation: This example demonstrates the full event handling lifecycle: DocumentListener for real-time username validation as the user types, ActionListener for Enter key navigation from username to password field, and ActionListener on password field for form submission. The NumericTextField from previous example is reused here.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) for regex validation where n is username length

examples.title: Currency TextField with Formatting
examples.description: Custom JTextField that formats input as currency with proper decimal handling
examples.explanation: This custom JTextField implementation handles currency input with automatic formatting. It uses an inner class extending PlainDocument to intercept all text changes. The key insight is treating all input as cents (multiplying by 100) to avoid floating-point issues, then formatting with DecimalFormat. The remove() method is also overridden to handle backspace correctly.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n log n) for DecimalFormat operations on n-digit numbers
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) for string manipulation during formatting
